error_signature: License request failed with status code 403
title: 403 Error on License Request in Docker
symptom: When attempting to request a license key from a self-hosted n8n instance running in Docker, the user receives a 'License request failed with status code 403' error.
applies_when: Using n8n in a self-hosted Docker environment
Attempting to request a license key
not_this_if: Running n8n in a non-Docker environment
root_cause: The 403 error indicates that the request is forbidden, which can occur if the n8n instance is not accessible over HTTPS or if there are network restrictions preventing the request from being completed.
fix_steps: Start n8n in tunnel mode to enable HTTPS access.
Request the license key while in tunnel mode.
Apply the license key in the settings.
agent_instruction: Start n8n in tunnel mode to request the license key, then restart without tunneling.
